title: LLMInvokeRequest
description: Typed broker-local model invoke request that carries one canonical LLMRequest plus run and digest binding metadata.

schema_id.description: Stable protocol object-family identifier for broker-local LLM invoke request wrappers.

schema_version.description: Exact protocol schema version used to validate this broker-local LLM invoke request wrapper.

run_id.description: Run identifier whose trusted policy context governs this model invocation.

llm_request.description: Canonical model request object carried through the broker-local API.

request_digest.description: Optional canonical digest for llm_request. When supplied, it must match the RFC8785-JCS sha256 of llm_request bytes.
